comparison_surface_note: Compares official Login serverbound custom_query_answer framed packet id and body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Login, Direction::Serverbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Login serverbound custom_query_answer framed dispatch/decode; not a plugin channel, acknowledgement, or runtime transition test.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Login serverbound custom_query_answer packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official null-payload fixture only; it does not prove plugin channel handling, custom payload semantics, login acknowledgement, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
